---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for CodeRover
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Request

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## 🔍 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe the problem you're trying to solve.

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as detailed as possible.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases for this feature:

1. As a [user type], I want [goal] so that [benefit]
2. As a [user type], I want [goal] so that [benefit]

## 📷 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples to help explain your feature request.

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria

Define what needs to be implemented for this feature to be considered complete:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

Any technical considerations or constraints to keep in mind:

- Performance implications
- Security considerations
- Compatibility requirements
- Dependencies

## 📈 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - I cannot use CodeRover effectively without this
- [ ] High - This would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - This would be a nice addition
- [ ] Low - This is a minor enhancement

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues or feature requests here.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or information about the feature request here.

## 🎨 Design Requirements

If this feature involves UI changes:

- Should it match the existing design system?
- Any specific design requirements or constraints?
- Accessibility considerations?

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the problem this feature would solve
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
